aronui.when_to_use: Use to update persistent working memory: set or append notes, update the plan, or manage task lists with trackable steps.
aronui.output_shape: Confirmation message indicating the working memory has been updated.

pitfalls.text: If 'tasks' is provided, each task object must have a 'text' field; missing it returns '[ERROR] Each task must have a non-empty "text" field.'
Providing 'notes', 'plan', 'add_notes', or 'add_plan' as a non-array returns '[ERROR] Expected an array for <parameter>.'
Providing 'tasks' as a non-array returns '[ERROR] tasks must be an array of objects.'

procedure: Decide which working memory component to update: notes, plan, add_notes, add_plan, or tasks.
For notes/plan, provide an array of strings to replace existing content; omit to keep current.
For add_notes/add_plan, provide an array of strings to append to existing content.
For tasks, provide an array of objects; each object must have a 'text' string (required) and may include 'status' (pending/done) and 'ts' (ISO timestamp).
Call the tool with the constructed parameters.
verification: After calling, inspect the updated <working_memory> to confirm the changes are reflected.
For tasks, verify new tasks appear with status 'pending' (if not specified) and existing tasks retain correct statuses.
